entity.summary: Global centralized cryptocurrency exchange launched in 2018 and headquartered in the United Arab Emirates. Bybit remained active after its February 2025 hot-wallet theft and expanded regulated European operations after Bybit EU GmbH received Austrian MiCAR authorization in May 2025.
entity.notes: The Austrian MiCAR authorization applies specifically to Bybit EU GmbH and its EEA-facing services, not to every global Bybit product or jurisdiction. The February 2025 security incident is already represented by existing event records and is not duplicated here.

expected.summary: UAE-based centralized exchange launched in 2018 and still operating under the Bybit brand.

changes.summary: Global centralized cryptocurrency exchange launched in 2018 and headquartered in the United Arab Emirates. Bybit remained active after its February 2025 hot-wallet theft and expanded regulated European operations after Bybit EU GmbH received Austrian MiCAR authorization in May 2025.
changes.notes: The Austrian MiCAR authorization applies specifically to Bybit EU GmbH and its EEA-facing services, not to every global Bybit product or jurisdiction. The February 2025 security incident is already represented by existing event records and is not duplicated here.

events.title: Bybit EU GmbH received Austrian MiCAR authorization
events.description: Austria's Financial Market Authority granted Bybit EU GmbH authorization as a crypto-asset service provider under MiCAR for custody, exchange, placing, and transfer services, supporting Bybit's regulated EEA platform rollout.
events.notes: The authorization is scoped to Bybit EU GmbH and the services listed by the Austrian FMA.

evidence.title: Granting of Authorisation Bybit EU GmbH
evidence.notes: Regulator notice stating that the administrative decision granting MiCAR authorization was dated 2025-05-28.

evidence.title: Bybit Launches Bybit EU, a Fully MiCAR-Compliant Platform for Europe's Crypto Users
evidence.notes: First-party announcement linking the Austrian authorization to the Bybit.eu EEA platform launch.

evidence.title: Bybit official exchange platform
evidence.notes: Current official domain confirming continued global exchange operation.
